primarySourceLabel: UW General Catalog International Studies: Europe major requirements
sourceLabel: UW General Catalog International Studies: Europe major requirements
requirementCueLines: The European Studies major prepares students to pursue careers requiring an understanding of all the forces, both material and cultural, contemporary and historical, that are shaping Europe today. These include the legacies of the Cold War and the complex dynamics of European political and economic integration. Students gain analytical and writing skills that can be applied widely in a wide variety of professional areas. The equivalent of second-year proficiency in a European language is required by the time of graduation, either through language study or placement testing.
